home.subtitle: Master the markets with professional-grade grid bots. Automate your strategy, manage risk, and track performance with precision.

smartGrids.title: Smart Grids
smartGrids.desc: Deploy sophisticated classic, long, or short grid strategies with dynamic spacing and volume control.

riskGuardrails.title: Risk Guardrails
riskGuardrails.desc: Built-in pre-flight checks, hedging requirements, and real-time monitoring to protect your capital.

globalReach.title: Global Reach
globalReach.desc: Full multi-language support and multi-currency tracking for traders across the globe.

smartTrade.title: SmartTrade Terminal
smartTrade.desc: Execute advanced orders with built-in Take Profit and Stop Loss. Manage your entire portfolio from a single, powerful interface.

dcaBots.title: Grid & DCA Bots
dcaBots.desc: Profit from market volatility 24/7. Run classic, long, or short strategies completely hands-free with optimized algorithms.

riskManagement.title: Risk Management
riskManagement.desc: Set global portfolio safeguards, trailed stops, and timeout rules. Your funds stay safe on the exchange via secure API connections.

newStrategy.title: Create Grid Bot
newStrategy.subtitle: Configure your trading parameters and launch a new strategy
